Our experienced technicians provide effective, long-lasting solutions to eliminate drain fly infestations in apartments, pre-war buildings, and commercial properties across Hudson Heights.

localContext: Hudson Heights' beautiful pre-war buildings and aging plumbing infrastructure can create ideal conditions for drain fly breeding in bathroom and kitchen drains. From Fort Tryon Park-area apartments to buildings along Cabrini Boulevard, our team understands the specific drain fly challenges facing this elevated northern Manhattan community.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Hudson Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: Hudson Heights has many pre-war and older buildings with aging plumbing systems where organic matter accumulates in drains, creating perfect breeding grounds for drain flies. The neighborhood's elevation and older infrastructure can contribute to drainage issues that allow these pests to thrive in bathroom and kitchen pipes.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Hudson Heights?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Hudson Heights take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat contaminated drains, and provide prevention recommendations. You should see significant reduction within 2-3 days, with complete elimination in 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains, application of bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic buildup, mechanical cleaning when necessary, treatment of all affected areas, and a follow-up visit if needed. The price varies based on the size of your property and severity of infestation.

faqs.question: Can drain flies in my Hudson Heights apartment spread to neighbors?
faqs.answer: Yes, drain flies can migrate between units through shared plumbing systems common in Hudson Heights apartment buildings. That's why prompt treatment is essential. We can coordinate with building management to address the issue comprehensively and prevent re-infestation from connected units.
